title: 🔥 Top 15 Articles to Memorize First
content:
These 15 articles carry 80% of the weightage for direct factual questions in SSC exams. Memorize these cold before studying the rest!

| Article | Topic | Core Detail |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Article 1** | India, Union of States | Defines territory of India |
| **Article 14** | Equality | Equality before law & equal protection |
| **Article 19** | Freedom | Six fundamental democratic freedoms |
| **Article 21** | Right to Life | Protection of life and personal liberty |
| **Article 21A** | Education | Free & compulsory education for 6-14 yrs |
| **Article 32** | Constitutional Remedies | Right to move SC for FR enforcement |
| **Article 39A** | Free Legal Aid | Free legal services for poor citizens |
| **Article 44** | Uniform Civil Code (UCC) | Uniform laws for all religious communities |
| **Article 51A** | Fundamental Duties | 11 core citizen responsibilities |
| **Article 52** | President | Defines the head of executive |
| **Article 74** | Council of Ministers | PM & Cabinet to advise the President |
| **Article 80** | Rajya Sabha | Composition of the Upper House |
| **Article 110** | Money Bill | Definition & procedures for Money Bills |
| **Article 324** | Election Commission | Supervise, direct, & control elections |
| **Article 368** | Constitutional Amendment | Power & procedure of Parliament to amend |

title: 🏆 Tier 1 Constitutional Articles (Must Know)
content:
High frequency articles frequently tested in Tier-1 exams.

| Article | Part | Topic | Memory Trick |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **1** | I | India – Union of States | **1 India** |
| **3** | I | Formation of new States | **3** = Three ways: create, merge, rename |
| **5–11** | II | Citizenship | **5–11** = Citizen |
| **12** | III | Definition of State | Start of Rights |
| **13** | III | Laws violating FR are void | **13** = Unlucky law |
| **14** | III | Equality before Law | **1+4 = Equal** (5 fingers each hand) |
| **15** | III | No discrimination | **15** = No discrimination |
| **16** | III | Equal opportunity in jobs | **16** = Government Jobs |
| **17** | III | Abolition of Untouchability | **17** breaks social barriers |
| **18** | III | Abolition of Titles | **18** = No "Sir", "Raja" |
| **19** | III | Six Fundamental Freedoms | **19** = Freedom |
| **20** | III | Protection in criminal cases | Criminal safeguards |
| **21** | III | Right to Life & Personal Liberty | **21** = Life |
| **21A** | III | Education (6–14 years) | **A** = Admission to school |
| **22** | III | Protection against arrest | Police article |
| **23** | III | Human trafficking prohibited | Human dignity |
| **24** | III | Child labour prohibited | Children |
| **25–28** | III | Freedom of Religion | Religion block |
| **29–30** | III | Cultural & Educational Rights | Minorities |
| **32** | III | Constitutional Remedies | **Heart & Soul** (Ambedkar) |
| **36–51** | IV | DPSP | Welfare State |
| **39A** | IV | Free Legal Aid | **A** = Advocate |
| **40** | IV | Panchayats | Village governance |
| **44** | IV | Uniform Civil Code | **UCC** |
| **48A** | IV | Environment | **A** = Air & Animals |
| **49** | IV | Monuments | Heritage |
| **50** | IV | Separation of Judiciary | Judges |
| **51** | IV | International Peace | UN |

title: ⭐ Tier 2 Articles (Very High Frequency)
content:
Highly predictable articles relating to Union Executive & Parliament.

| Article | Part | Topic | Memory Trick |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **51A** | IVA | Fundamental Duties | **A** = Actions (Duties) |
| **52** | V | President | President starts Union Executive |
| **54** | V | Election of President | Electoral College |
| **61** | V | Impeachment of President | Remove President |
| **63** | V | Vice-President | **VP** |
| **74** | V | Council of Ministers | PM advises President |
| **75** | V | Prime Minister | PM & Council |
| **76** | V | Attorney General | Government lawyer |
| **80** | V | Rajya Sabha Composition | **80** = Upper House |
| **81** | V | Lok Sabha Composition | **81** = Lower House |
| **83** | V | Term of Parliament | 5 years |
| **85** | V | Sessions of Parliament | Summon/Prorogue |
| **110** | V | Money Bill | **110** = Money |
| **112** | V | Union Budget | Annual Financial Statement |
| **123** | V | President's Ordinance | Emergency lawmaking |
| **124** | V | Supreme Court | SC starts at 124 |
| **143** | V | President seeks SC advice | Advisory Jurisdiction |

title: ⭐ Tier 3 Articles (Frequently Asked)
content:
Frequently queried bodies, offices, and emergency provisions.

| Article | Topic | Core Detail |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **148** | CAG | Comptroller & Auditor General of India |
| **153** | Governor | Governors of States |
| **155** | Appointment of Governor | Appointed by President of India |
| **163** | Gov Council of Ministers | Cabinet to aid and advise Governor |
| **165** | Advocate General | State legal adviser |
| **214** | High Court | High Courts for States |
| **226** | HC Writs | Power of High Courts to issue writs |
| **243** | Panchayats | Definitions & Gram Sabha |
| **243P** | Municipalities | Definitions & Composition |
| **280** | Finance Commission | Recommends tax distribution |
| **300A** | Right to Property | Legal/Constitutional Right (not FR) |
| **312** | All India Services | IAS, IPS, IFS |
| **315** | UPSC | Public Service Commissions |
| **324** | Election Commission | Superintends election process |
| **330** | SC/ST LS Reservation | Reserved seats in Lok Sabha |
| **343** | Official Language | Hindi in Devanagari script |
| **352** | National Emergency | War, external aggression, armed rebellion |
| **356** | President's Rule | Failure of constitutional machinery |
| **360** | Financial Emergency | Threat to financial stability |
| **368** | Constitutional Amendment | Power of Parliament to amend |

title: 🗺️ Constitution Articles Memory Roadmap
content:
Organize article numbers by Part to build a clear mental schema.

```text
Part I (Union & Territory) ─── [1, 3]
│
Part II (Citizenship) ──────── [5-11]
│
Part III (Fundamental Rights) ─ [12, 13, 14, 15, 16, 17, 18, 19, 21, 21A, 32]
│
Part IV (DPSP) ─────────────── [39A, 44, 48A]
│
Part IVA (Duties) ──────────── [51A]
│
Part V (Union Government) ──── [52, 74, 80, 110, 124]
│
Part XV (Elections) ────────── [324]
│
Part XVIII (Emergencies) ───── [352, 356, 360]
│
Part XX (Amendment) ────────── [368]
```

title: 🎯 Daily Micro Trick: The 5-Point Memory Chain
content:
To memorize effectively, link each article using this 5-point chain:

`Article` → `Part` → `Topic` → `Keyword` → `PYQ Fact`

> **Example: Article 32**
> - **Article**: Article 32
> - **Part**: Part III
> - **Topic**: Constitutional Remedies
> - **Keyword**: Heart & Soul
> - **PYQ Fact**: Called the "Heart and Soul of the Constitution" by Dr. B. R. Ambedkar
